name: Quick Chocolate Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a jelly roll pan and line with waxed paper. Ensure the paper is also greased.
2. Beat egg whites until they form soft peaks. Gradually add salt, beating to stiff peaks.
3. In a separate bowl, beat yolks and vanilla extract until thick.
4. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the beaten egg whites, adding cocoa powder.
5. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F (175°C). Turn out of the oven immediately.
7. Place a towel on a sheet of parchment paper and transfer the cooled torte onto it, sprinkling with powdered sugar.
8. Remove the waxed paper lining and cool for an additional 15 minutes.
9. Cut into quarters.
10. Spread each quarter with whipped cream and stack. Decorate with chocolate shavings, curls, or nuts.
